clustered_themes: Escalation-ladder discipline helps foreign employers avoid premature route commitments.
Most disputes emerge from unresolved issues that should have moved to higher review earlier.
Settlement and IIT checks belong in core triage, not final admin.
Local forum variability should trigger conditional escalation rungs.
dedup_notes: Rotated from go/no-go gate style to triage-ladder escalation style.
Avoided timeline and prior gateboard skeleton repetition.
uncertainties: City-level labor dispute practice can differ.
English legal text may not fully reflect Chinese-language nuance.
Case outcomes remain fact and process dependent.
